title: Culpitt 8" Square Cake Boxes With Lid | 5 Pack | Rigid Transport And Protection For Birthday, Wedding, And Celebration Bakes, Recyclable Cardboard Bakery Boxes - Pack Of 5
features: 5 WHITE CAKE BOXES - These cake boxes are plain white, windowless, and 5 inches high. Pack includes 5 premium white cake boxes, flat-packed for easy storage. Quick to assemble and cost-effective—perfect for batch baking, party orders, and professional cake deliveries.

STURDY CAKE PROTECTION – The 8 inch square cake box with lid is perfect for keeping your freshly baked cakes or other sweet treats free from damage in transport or in-store. These 5 boxes for cakes are ideal for regular bakers, cake makers, or decorators.

EASY TO ASSEMBLE - The plain white cake box is delivered flat but is very easy to assemble meaning you will be ready to transport your cake in seconds. Ideal for a 5 or 6 inch cake up to 4" tall. Shrink wrapped for hygiene. Box measures 8"(L) x 8"(W) x 5"(H)

STRONG - Pre folded and glued lid for a strong and sturdy supportive structure when applied to the box base. Together the box and lid achieve rigid and reliable packaging and protection so you can be confident in transporting your cakes, cupcakes, doughnuts, or other sweet treats! Made from thick, food-grade cardboard that’s both recyclable and grease-resistant. These disposable cake boxes are durable enough for stacking and ideal for safe cake transport.

PROFESSIONAL FINISH - Simple, elegant white design adds a clean, polished look to your bakes. Great for branding, stickers, or custom stamps. Makes your cakes stand out at markets, bake sales, events, or gift-giving.
description: From the manufacturer Culpitt White Cake Box And Lid, Pack of 5 This premium white cake box and lid set is ideal for efficiently and safely transporting all your homemade cakes for Valentines, birthdays, celebrations, weddings, and parties. Together the cake box and pre-glued lid achieve rigid and reliable protection so you can be confident in transporting your cakes this festive holiday period. The box is plain white, windowless and 6 inches high. Manufactured using food-grade white card Pair with a suitable Cake Board or Drum Shrink Wrapped For Hygiene Supplied as a pack of 5 cake boxes, shrink wrapped for hygiene and easy storage. Strong Pre folded and glued lid together with the box achieve rigid and reliable packaging and protection so you can be confident in transporting your cake. 5 Pack A 5 Pack of boxes ensures you'll always have a supply handy when you next bake! Designed for cake makers and regular bakers. Easy to Assemble Culpitt Cake Boxes are supplied flat packed but are easy to assemble in seconds. specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Hand wash only with a damp cloth. Do not use in microwave, oven, or dishwasher. Allow to dry completely before storing. Recycle when finished.
